title: polygonon bistortum
intro: Polygonon bistortum, also known as the American bistort or bistort, is a perennial plant species in the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and tannins. The health benefits of Polygonon bistortum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, or used in salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
